name: dropbeam
description: Instant peer-to-peer file transfer with 6-digit codes and QR

scripts.start: echo 'DropBeam is now deployed on Supabase Edge Functions. See DEPLOYMENT.md for details.'
scripts.deploy:functions: npx supabase functions deploy init-upload && npx supabase functions deploy confirm-upload && npx supabase functions deploy get-download && npx supabase functions deploy file-info && npx supabase functions deploy stats && npx supabase functions deploy admin-transfers
